name: DSG Governance Gate
description: Displays ALLOW, BLOCK, or REVIEW policy decisions on payment detail views.
about: DSG Governance Gate displays ALLOW, BLOCK, or REVIEW policy decisions on the Stripe Dashboard payment detail view. Each decision shows its policy version, proof reference, and evaluation time inside the app panel. If the governance service is unreachable, the panel shows REVIEW — never ALLOW.

features.name: Policy decision display
features.description: Each charge opened in the payment detail view shows an ALLOW, BLOCK, or REVIEW decision badge with the reason, rendered inside the Stripe Dashboard app panel.

features.name: Decision details
features.description: Every decision shows its policy version, proof reference, and evaluation timestamp in the app panel, giving operators a verifiable record for each evaluated charge.

features.name: Fail-safe behavior
features.description: If the governance API is unreachable or returns an unknown verdict, the panel shows REVIEW instead of ALLOW, so an outage never reads as approval.

permissions.purpose: Read charge details to display governance policy decisions in the payment detail view

content_security_policy.purpose: Connect to DSG governance API for policy evaluation and audit recording
